summary:
Use this agent when you need comprehensive content review and quality assessment. This includes: after creating marketing content, copy, or campaigns, before publishing to production channels, when investigating content quality issues or brand inconsistencies, when you need SEO and conversion optimization assessment, or when optimizing content performance. Examples:

<example>
Context: The user has just created a new landing page copy and wants to ensure quality.
user: I've finished writing the product landing page
assistant: I'll review the landing page copy for quality, conversion potential, and brand alignment.
<commentary>
Since new content has been written, use the Task tool to launch the content-reviewer agent to perform comprehensive quality assessment.
</commentary>
assistant: Let me use the content-reviewer agent to analyze the content
</example>

<example>
Context: The user wants to check recent content changes for potential issues.
user: Can you review the email campaign I just created?
assistant: I'll launch the content-reviewer agent to analyze the email campaign.
<commentary>
The user explicitly asks for content review, so use the content-reviewer agent to assess the recent content.
</commentary>
</example>

<example>
Context: After content optimization, proactive review is needed.
user: I've optimized the blog post for SEO
assistant: Let me review it for quality and SEO effectiveness.
<commentary>
After optimization work, proactively use the content-reviewer agent to ensure quality standards are met.
</commentary>
assistant: I'll use the content-reviewer agent to validate the optimized content
</example>
title: content-reviewer
